MTA.ManualPreviewZoomHint: Wheel: preview zoom. Shift+wheel: frame size.
MTA.ManualAlphaNeedLock: Lock the main circle first (LMB), then enable alpha drawing.
MTA.ManualAlphaPendingNotApplied: There are unapplied selections. Click Apply Alpha or clear/undo them.
MTA.ManualAlphaStatusNeedLock: Lock the circle to edit alpha.
MTA.ManualTokenHint: Left click locks the circle, second left click unlocks it. Mouse wheel zoom: 0.1x–10x. For alpha: lock circle → enable Draw Alpha → LMB (add), Alt+LMB (erase) → Apply Alpha.
MTA.ManualTokenSelectArea: Select an area for manual token creation.
MTA.SourceImageRequired: Set an image source before processing.
MTA.TokenTargetNotFound: Target token entry was not found.
MTA.PlaceholderSettings: Select 🖊 on an image or right mouse click on an image to open settings.
MTA.DirectoryCreateError: Failed to create Multi Token Art folder: {error}
MTA.DirectoryCreateTimeout: Failed to create folder: timed out waiting for GM response.
MTA.DirectoryCreateNoActiveGM: Failed to create folder: no active GM is online.
MTA.DeleteImageContent: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
MTA.BatchCreateComplete: Batch token generation complete. Created: {created}, Skipped: {skipped}, Errors: {errors}.
MTA.ManualFrameDropHint: Drag, paste (Ctrl+V when hovering) or browse for a frame image
MTA.ManualFrameDragHint: Drag the frame in the preview area to reposition it.
